about.title: About Me
about.subtitle: Get to know me better
about.bio: I'm a Platform Engineer at Mottu with over 6 years of experience building scalable web applications and developer platforms. My journey spans from full-stack development to frontend architecture and platform engineering, giving me a unique perspective on the entire software delivery lifecycle. I specialize in designing Internal Developer Platforms, Design Systems, and Micro Frontend architectures that empower engineering teams to ship faster with confidence. I'm passionate about developer experience, CI/CD automation, and creating tools that bridge the gap between development and operations.

skills.title: Skills
skills.subtitle: Technologies and tools I work with

mottu_pe.descriptions: Architecting the Internal Developer Platform (IDP) for streamlined workflows. Designing the company-wide Design System and Micro Frontend architectures. Engineering CI/CD pipelines for Angular, Flutter Web, and React. Developing LowCode AI-powered tools for internal automation.

mottu_tl.descriptions: Led and mentored the frontend team, establishing best practices and code review standards. Spearheaded Angular migration improving performance. Implemented real-time systems with Redis Pub/Sub and Socket.IO. Built observability dashboards using Datadog.

mottu_pfl.descriptions: Created SPA and Micro Frontend boilerplates that standardized project scaffolding. Developed shared Angular component libraries. Implemented SSO authentication and internationalization (i18n). Led architecture and technical support for product teams.

mottu_fd.descriptions: Developed web applications using Angular 12, Blazor (WebAssembly) and MVC Razor. Built interactive UI components and server-rendered views. Collaborated in Agile teams using Scrum and Kanban methodologies.

predict.descriptions: Developed a SaaS platform for nutritionists using the MEAN stack (MongoDB, Express, Angular, Node.js). Designed the MongoDB database schema optimized for performance. Collaborated with stakeholders to translate business needs into technical solutions.

ng_architect_cli.title: NG Architect CLI
ng_architect_cli.description: CLI tool that scaffolds production-ready Angular projects with Micro Frontends, Design System, CI/CD pipelines, SSO, and i18n pre-configured. Your mini Internal Developer Platform.

mfe_playground.title: MFE Playground
mfe_playground.description: Multi-framework Micro Frontend playground with Angular, React, and Vue remotes orchestrated via Native Federation, featuring a real-time metrics dashboard.

ngx_signal_store.title: NGX Signal Store
ngx_signal_store.description: Lightweight state management library for Angular 21+ using pure Signals. Entity stores, computed helpers, devtools with time-travel — no NgRx, no Redux.

govbr_ds_angular.title: GovBR Design System
govbr_ds_angular.description: Angular implementation of the Brazilian Government Design System (GovBR-DS), ensuring accessibility and usability standards compliance.

the_hit_movie.title: The Hit Movie
the_hit_movie.description: A Progressive Web App for movie discovery with search, ratings and recommendations powered by the IMDB API with Material UI.

egress_system.title: Egress System
egress_system.description: Alumni management platform for the Federal University of Uberlândia (UFU), built with Angular 18 for tracking and connecting graduates.

ui_context.title: UI Context
ui_context.description: MCP server that extracts component metadata from React and Angular design systems, enabling AI assistants like Claude and Cursor to deeply understand your component library — props, examples, design tokens and all.
